question_intent: Average goals allowed by goalies who have recorded at least one shutout in a game where their team won, grouped by team and year, and then filtered to only include teams that had an average of more than 100 goals allowed in the year

plan.question_intent: Average goals allowed by goalies who have recorded at least one shutout in a game where their team won, grouped by team and year, and then filtered to only include teams that had an average of more than 100 goals allowed in the year
plan.detail_query: SELECT leaf_1.tmid, leaf_1.year, leaf_1.avg_ga FROM (SELECT g.tmid, g.year, AVG(CAST(g.ga AS FLOAT)) AS avg_ga FROM goalies g JOIN combinedshutouts cs ON g.playerid = cs.idgoalie1 OR g.playerid = cs.idgoalie2 JOIN teams t ON g.tmid = t.tmid JOIN teamvsteam tvt ON t.tmid = tvt.tmid AND t.year = tvt.year JOIN teams opp ON tvt.oppid = opp.tmid AND tvt.year = opp.year WHERE (tvt.w > 0) AND (tvt.l = 0) GROUP BY g.tmid, g.year) AS leaf_1 GROUP BY leaf_1.tmid, leaf_1.year HAVING AVG(leaf_1.avg_ga) > 100

blocks.name: leaf_1
blocks.select_clause: SELECT g.tmid, g.year, AVG(CAST(g.ga AS FLOAT)) AS avg_ga
join_clauses: JOIN combinedshutouts cs ON g.playerid = cs.idgoalie1 OR g.playerid = cs.idgoalie2
JOIN teams t ON g.tmid = t.tmid
JOIN teamvsteam tvt ON t.tmid = tvt.tmid AND t.year = tvt.year
JOIN teams opp ON tvt.oppid = opp.tmid AND tvt.year = opp.year
blocks.notes: Average goals allowed by goalies who have recorded at least one shutout in a game where their team won

build_logs.notes: Average goals allowed by goalies who have recorded at least one shutout in a game where their team won

steps.clause: JOIN combinedshutouts cs ON g.playerid = cs.idgoalie1 OR g.playerid = cs.idgoalie2
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM goalies g
JOIN combinedshutouts cs ON g.playerid = cs.idgoalie1 OR g.playerid = cs.idgoalie2
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: JOIN teams t ON g.tmid = t.tmid
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM goalies g
JOIN combinedshutouts cs ON g.playerid = cs.idgoalie1 OR g.playerid = cs.idgoalie2
JOIN teams t ON g.tmid = t.tmid
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: JOIN teamvsteam tvt ON t.tmid = tvt.tmid AND t.year = tvt.year
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM goalies g
JOIN combinedshutouts cs ON g.playerid = cs.idgoalie1 OR g.playerid = cs.idgoalie2
JOIN teams t ON g.tmid = t.tmid
JOIN teamvsteam tvt ON t.tmid = tvt.tmid AND t.year = tvt.year
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: JOIN teams opp ON tvt.oppid = opp.tmid AND tvt.year = opp.year
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM goalies g
JOIN combinedshutouts cs ON g.playerid = cs.idgoalie1 OR g.playerid = cs.idgoalie2
JOIN teams t ON g.tmid = t.tmid
JOIN teamvsteam tvt ON t.tmid = tvt.tmid AND t.year = tvt.year
JOIN teams opp ON tvt.oppid = opp.tmid AND tvt.year = opp.year
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: JOIN teamvsteam opp ON tvt.oppid = opp.tmid
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM goalies g
JOIN combinedshutouts cs ON g.playerid = cs.idgoalie1 OR g.playerid = cs.idgoalie2
JOIN teams t ON g.tmid = t.tmid
JOIN teamvsteam tvt ON t.tmid = tvt.tmid AND t.year = tvt.year
JOIN teamvsteam opp ON tvt.oppid = opp.tmid
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM goalies g
JOIN combinedshutouts cs ON g.playerid = cs.idgoalie1 OR g.playerid = cs.idgoalie2
JOIN teams t ON g.tmid = t.tmid
JOIN teamvsteam tvt ON t.tmid = tvt.tmid AND t.year = tvt.year
JOIN teamvsteam opp ON tvt.oppid = opp.tmid
WHERE (tvt.w > 0)
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM goalies g
JOIN combinedshutouts cs ON g.playerid = cs.idgoalie1 OR g.playerid = cs.idgoalie2
JOIN teams t ON g.tmid = t.tmid
JOIN teamvsteam tvt ON t.tmid = tvt.tmid AND t.year = tvt.year
JOIN teamvsteam opp ON tvt.oppid = opp.tmid
WHERE (tvt.w > 0) AND (tvt.l = 0)
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM goalies g
JOIN combinedshutouts cs ON g.playerid = cs.idgoalie1 OR g.playerid = cs.idgoalie2
JOIN teams t ON g.tmid = t.tmid
JOIN teamvsteam tvt ON t.tmid = tvt.tmid AND t.year = tvt.year
JOIN teamvsteam opp ON tvt.oppid = opp.tmid
WHERE (tvt.w > 0) AND (tvt.l >= 0)
LIMIT 5

SELECT g.tmid, g.year, AVG(CAST(g.ga AS FLOAT)) AS avg_ga
FROM goalies g
JOIN combinedshutouts cs ON g.playerid = cs.idgoalie1 OR g.playerid = cs.idgoalie2
JOIN teams t ON g.tmid = t.tmid
JOIN teamvsteam tvt ON t.tmid = tvt.tmid AND t.year = tvt.year
JOIN teamvsteam opp ON tvt.oppid = opp.tmid
WHERE (tvt.w > 0) AND (tvt.l >= 0)
GROUP BY g.tmid, g.year

build_logs.notes: Final scalar block with the average goals allowed by teams that had an average of more than 100 goals allowed in the year

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM (SELECT g.tmid, g.year, AVG(CAST(g.ga AS FLOAT)) AS avg_ga
FROM goalies g
JOIN combinedshutouts cs ON g.playerid = cs.idgoalie1 OR g.playerid = cs.idgoalie2
JOIN teams t ON g.tmid = t.tmid
JOIN teamvsteam tvt ON t.tmid = tvt.tmid AND t.year = tvt.year
JOIN teamvsteam opp ON tvt.oppid = opp.tmid
WHERE (tvt.w > 0) AND (tvt.l >= 0)
GROUP BY g.tmid, g.year) AS leaf_1
LIMIT 5

SELECT AVG(leaf_1.avg_ga) AS avg_ga_over_teams
FROM (SELECT g.tmid, g.year, AVG(CAST(g.ga AS FLOAT)) AS avg_ga
FROM goalies g
JOIN combinedshutouts cs ON g.playerid = cs.idgoalie1 OR g.playerid = cs.idgoalie2
JOIN teams t ON g.tmid = t.tmid
JOIN teamvsteam tvt ON t.tmid = tvt.tmid AND t.year = tvt.year
JOIN teamvsteam opp ON tvt.oppid = opp.tmid
WHERE (tvt.w > 0) AND (tvt.l >= 0)
GROUP BY g.tmid, g.year) AS leaf_1
GROUP BY leaf_1.tmid, leaf_1.year
HAVING (AVG(leaf_1.avg_ga) > 100)

SELECT AVG(leaf_1.avg_ga) AS avg_ga_over_teams
FROM (SELECT g.tmid, g.year, AVG(CAST(g.ga AS FLOAT)) AS avg_ga
FROM goalies g
JOIN combinedshutouts cs ON g.playerid = cs.idgoalie1 OR g.playerid = cs.idgoalie2
JOIN teams t ON g.tmid = t.tmid
JOIN teamvsteam tvt ON t.tmid = tvt.tmid AND t.year = tvt.year
JOIN teamvsteam opp ON tvt.oppid = opp.tmid
WHERE (tvt.w > 0) AND (tvt.l >= 0)
GROUP BY g.tmid, g.year) AS leaf_1
GROUP BY leaf_1.tmid, leaf_1.year
HAVING (AVG(leaf_1.avg_ga) > 100)

nearest.sql:
SELECT AVG(leaf_1.ga) AS avg_goals_allowed
FROM (SELECT g.playerid, g.year, g.ga
FROM goalies g
JOIN combinedshutouts cs ON g.playerid = cs.idgoalie1 OR g.playerid = cs.idgoalie2
JOIN teams t ON g.tmid = t.tmid
JOIN abbrev a ON t.confid = a.code
WHERE (a.type = 'Conference') AND (a.fullname = 'Campbell Conference')
GROUP BY g.playerid, g.year, g.ga) AS leaf_1

SELECT AVG(leaf_1.ga) AS avg_goals_allowed
FROM (SELECT g.playerid, g.year, g.ga
FROM goalies g
JOIN combinedshutouts cs ON g.playerid = cs.idgoalie1 OR g.playerid = cs.idgoalie2
JOIN teams t ON g.tmid = t.tmid
JOIN abbrev a ON t.confid = a.code
WHERE (a.type = 'Conference') AND (a.fullname = 'Campbell Conference')
GROUP BY g.playerid, g.year, g.ga) AS leaf_1

question: What is the average of the average goals-against values across teams and years, but only include those teams and years where this average of averages exceeds 100?
